Parameters.Name: jqj_FailBuild
Parameters.Label: Fail Deployment
Parameters.HelpText: Fail the deployment if the job fails or time-out occurs.

Parameters.Name: jqj_JobTimeout
Parameters.Label: Timeout Duration(secs)
Parameters.HelpText: e.g. 60. Specify in secs how long to check for the job status before timing out.

Parameters.Name: jqj_WaitForComplete
Parameters.Label: Wait for complete
Parameters.HelpText: Wait until the job has completed, overrides `Timeout Duration`.

Parameters.Name: jqj_BuildParam
Parameters.Label: Build Param
Parameters.HelpText:
To use build parameters, update `/build` to `/buildWithParameters`
e.g. ?Param=Value or ?delay=10sec

Parameters.Name: jqj_JenkinsUserName
Parameters.Label: Jenkins User Name
Parameters.HelpText: (Optional) User name  to use to connect to the Jenkins Server

Parameters.Name: jqj_JenkinsUserPasword
Parameters.Label: Jenkins User Password
Parameters.HelpText: (Optional) The password to use to connect to the Jenkins Server.  In newer versions of Jenkins, this needs to be the API token for the user.

Parameters.Name: jqj_checkInterval
Parameters.Label: Check Interval
Parameters.HelpText: The sleep time between checking if the job is running in seconds

Parameters.Name: jqj_FetchBuildWait
Parameters.Label: Fetch Build URL Wait(secs)
Parameters.HelpText: e.g. 10 Used when getting the build URL. Useful if Jenkins is busy and can't schedule job immediately or there are connection issues. Helps limit excess calls to /api

Parameters.Name: jqj_FetchBuildLimit
Parameters.Label: Fetch Build URL Limit
Parameters.HelpText: e.g. 5. Used to limit the number of times the script asks for the build URL. Used in with FetchBuildURLWait to limit the calls made to /api for build URL.

Parameters.Name: jqj_AttachBuildLog
Parameters.Label: Attach build log
Parameters.HelpText: Attaches the build log from Jenkins as an [Artifact](https://octopus.com/docs/projects/deployment-process/artifacts).  This feature will only work when `Wait for complete` is also enabled.
